'''Tragg Brathis''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was an alleged [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] that led the [[Grand Imperial Union]].

==Biography==
The only known appearance of Brathis was during a pirate [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] transmission over [[Channel 81]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. In the transmission, Brathis displayed his [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] fleet and announced his support of the Dushkan League.

The broadcast dismayed some [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] leaders, fearing that the forces of [[Nil Spaar]] were stronger than anticipated, but the existence of Brathis and his forces were never substantiated and was disregard as [[Yevetha]]n propaganda.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
